name: Kokoretsi Tis Souvlas ( Skewered Variety Meats )
recipeInstructions:
Serves: 6 (as an appetizer)
Cooking time: 15-20 minutes
1. Rinse sweetbreads in a pan and cover with water. Add juice of half a lemon. Bring to a boil, then drain.
2. Place liver, heart, and halved kidneys in a bowl filled with cold water. Add juice of one lemon. Soak for 30 minutes, then drain.
3. Remove skin from liver and trim larger tubes from liver and heart; cut out fatty core from kidneys.
4. Cut meats and sweetbreads into 3 cm (1-1/4 inch) pieces and place in a glass or ceramic bowl.
5. Blend marinade ingredients and pour over prepared meats. Cover and leave to marinate in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
6. Soak sausage casings in cold water while marinating.
7. Thread meats alternately on 6 skewers, adding two pieces of bay leaf between each piece of meat.
8. Drain sausage casings and wind a length around each skewer, tucking ends to keep them secure.
9. Grill slowly over glowing charcoal, turning skewers frequently and brushing kokoretsi with marinade occasionally.
10. Cook for 15 to 20 minutes, adjusting the height of the grill or moving skewers to cooler parts of the fire to ensure even cooking.
11. Serve hot.
